name: ECurve.Curve
comment:
Contains curve definitions,
utility functions for retrieving said definitions,
and a function for determining if point is on the curve

@docs CurveType, getCurve, new, isOnCurve

values.name: getCurve
values.comment: Gets a curve for a given curve type

values.name: isOnCurve
values.comment: Checks if point is on a curve

values.name: new
values.comment: Returns a new elliptic curve from points
values.type: BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> Curve

name: ECurve.Point
comment:
Handles point calculations

@docs new, affineX, affineY, fromAffine, negate, equal, multiply, twice, add

values.name: equal
values.comment: Checks if two points are equal

values.name: fromAffine
values.comment: Returns a point from affine parameters

values.name: negate
values.comment: Returns the negation of a point

values.name: new
values.comment: Returns a new point from big ints
values.type: BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> BigInt -> Point

name: ECurve.Models
comment:
Model definitions for point and curves

@docs Point, Curve

aliases.name: Curve
aliases.type: { p : BigInt, a : BigInt, b : BigInt, g : Point, n : BigInt, h : BigInt, pLength : Int }

aliases.name: Point
aliases.comment: Defines a single point on the curve
aliases.type: { x : BigInt, y : BigInt, z : BigInt, p : BigInt, a : BigInt, zInv : BigInt, compressed : Bool }
